summary: Iter 98 review — Backend 21/21 (100%) via new pytest test_iter98_payroll_rules.py covering salary-process gates (online/offline 403+200 with TEST firm), compute_compliance_row PF/ESI firm gates, CL/PL 400 validation, /admin/leave-report shape, salary+compliance export.csv sort_by (name|code|net|gross), Textile Policy 2 <8h→all-OT, and _actual_salary_row_compute ot_basis basic vs gross. Frontend: Firm Master (Kankani) — fm-ot-basis-basic AND fm-ot-basis-gross radios PRESENT; '15. Report Order' section removed VERIFIED; leave-report screen renders (Kankani chip + 2024/2025/2026 year chips + lr-csv download + populated table). /reports?tab=salary shows rep-sort-name/code/net/gross + rep-finalized-only chips VERIFIED. Salary-run + compliance-salary-run sort chips (asal-sort-*/comp-sort-*) exist in source (salary-run.tsx:732, compliance-salary-run.tsx:945) but only render once a run/grid is loaded — could not visually confirm without generating a new run. Missing testIDs on 3 critical Firm-Master toggles (Online Salary / Offline Salary / Bio Matrix Attendance) — cannot automate the 'Offline Salary ON auto-flips Bio Matrix ON' rule without them.

ui_bugs.component: firm-master.tsx §10 Salary Process Settings — Toggle rows
ui_bugs.issue: The Online Salary / Offline Salary / Bio Matrix Attendance Toggle components (firm-master.tsx:714, 716, 724) do NOT pass a testID prop. Consequently the review-request testIDs fm-online-salary, fm-offline-salary and fm-bio-matrix are absent from the DOM and the Iter-98 rule ‘enabling Offline Salary auto-flips Bio Matrix Attendance ON’ cannot be exercised in Playwright.

asal-sort-* / comp-sort-* chips exist in the source (lines 732 & 945 respectively) but only render once a run grid has been generated or an existing run opened. Manual verification with a generated run for Kankani is recommended (backend export.csv?sort_by already covered by pytest).

issues: Table 'Other' column has no header hint that it also counts as leave taken — cosmetic, low priority.

action_items: Add testID props to the 3 Toggle rows in firm-master.tsx §10 Salary Process Settings — testID="fm-online-salary", "fm-offline-salary", "fm-bio-matrix". After that, the Iter 98 auto-flip rule (Offline ON → Bio Matrix ON) can be automated. Optional: also expose disabled state so testers can verify gate behaviour on the toggle itself.

OPTIONAL — Retest asal-sort-* and comp-sort-* by generating a small salary+compliance run for Kankani (month 2026-05, employee_type=Staff). Backend export sorting is already covered by test_iter98_payroll_rules.py::TestExportSort. Then delete both runs from db.salary_runs / db.compliance_salary_runs.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py continues to grow past 17,300 lines — recommend extracting the salary/compliance domain (currently ~4k lines around ln 12500–17300) into /routes and /services modules over the next iterations. Not blocking.

_require_firm_salary_permission (server.py:13546) skips the gate when company_id is None (super-admin cross-firm scope). This is intentional but should be documented in the endpoint spec — otherwise a super_admin can bypass the firm gate by omitting company_id.

routes/leaves.py leave_report: 'other_taken' is bucketed but the response body does not communicate that 'other' leave types (sick, unpaid, etc.) do not consume CL/PL allowance. Frontend already shows an 'Other' column — worth a small tooltip / help text.
utils/compliance_salary.py compute_compliance_row keyword-only firm_pf_enabled/firm_esic_enabled default True → safe fallback if a caller upgrades incrementally. Good.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iter98_payroll_rules.py (NEW — 21 test cases covering all Iter 98 backend rules)

success_rate.frontend: ~90% — Firm Master OT basis radios ✓, Report Order removed ✓, Leave Report page ✓, /reports sort+finalized chips ✓; run-grid sort chips (asal-sort-*/comp-sort-*) not visually verified because no run was open; fm-*-salary and fm-bio-matrix toggles have no testID (MEDIUM bug)

seed_data_creation: Created 1 throwaway TEST_ITER98_* firm per class-scoped fixture (used to flip salary_process flags) — auto-deleted in teardown_module. Kankani firm's salary_process (online/offline), epf.applicable, esi.applicable and leave_policy were touched by CL/PL test but restored via curl script (all True + cl_pl_applicable=False, verified with GET). No residual _test_temp or TEST_ITER98 documents remain (verified via /api/companies).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reliable Playwright auth for this preview: (1) POST /api/auth/admin-password-login {email, password} → response key is 'session_token' (NOT 'token'); (2) page.add_init_script(`localStorage.setItem('llc_session_token', '<tok>')`) BEFORE first goto — this bypasses the Cloudflare/expo redirect loop. Company selection for firm-master uses CompanyPicker component: click [data-testid='company-picker-trigger'] then [data-testid='company-picker-option-<company_id>']. Backend test file test_iter98_payroll_rules.py is a good regression base — includes leaf tests + module-level teardown for TEST_ firms. Note: creating a company requires office_lat/office_lng (non-optional Pydantic fields) and company_code max 8 chars.
rca_of_issue: Only issue found: 3 Toggle rows in firm-master.tsx §10 lack testID. Root cause — the Toggle component supports a testID prop (declared in its signature at line 73) but the 3 salary_process invocations were added without passing one. Fix is a 3-line prop addition: <Toggle label='Online Salary' testID='fm-online-salary' ... />, <Toggle label='Offline Salary' testID='fm-offline-salary' ... />, <Toggle label='Bio Matrix Attendance' testID='fm-bio-matrix' ... />.
